title: Domestic Dispute — Desperate Father
brief: A 38-year-old father has barricaded himself in his apartment with his estranged partner after a custody hearing went against him. No weapons confirmed. One adult hostage. Neighbors called 911 after hearing shouting. Subject is emotionally distraught but has no criminal history.

demands.text: I want to talk to my kids

opening_message: NOBODY MOVE! I just... I just want to see my kids. That's all I want. Why won't anyone let me see my kids?!
